positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application dashboard or home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the Login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify the authenticated user's name or profile indicator is displayed on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session is persisted after page refresh and the user remains authenticated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page content is still displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and verify session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password characters are masked during input and login is successful
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the Login page is displayed
Click on the password input field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify that the entered characters are masked (displayed as dots or asterisks)
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Password field masks characters during input

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful as email fields are typically case-insensitive; user is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'TestD1051@Gmail.Com' (mixed case version of the email) in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard or home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with username containing mixed case letters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and protected pages are no longer accessible
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Locate and click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button or option
Verify the user is redirected back to the Login page
Verify that navigating to the dashboard URL directly redirects back to the Login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All expected UI elements on the Login page are present, correctly labelled, and visually intact
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the Login page title or heading is visible
Verify the username/email input field is displayed and is empty by default
Verify the password input field is displayed and is empty by default
Verify the 'Login' / 'Submit' button is visible and enabled
Verify any 'Forgot Password' or 'Remember Me' links/checkboxes are displayed if applicable
Verify the page layout renders without visual errors on a standard desktop resolution (1280x720)
positive_scenarios.title: Login page UI elements are displayed correctly

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and validation error messages are displayed for both empty fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify that the form is not submitted
Verify that appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g. 'Email is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is displayed without revealing which field is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials', 'Incorrect username or password', or similar
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an error message is displayed; system does not expose whether the email exists
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistentuser_9999@fakeDomain.com' in the username/email field
Enter any password (e.g. 'TestPassword@123') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'User not found'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid/unregistered email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is displayed indicating the password field is required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Password is required' or 'Please enter your password'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is displayed indicating the username/email field is required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Email is required' or 'Please enter your email'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a format validation error is shown for the improperly formatted email
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalidemail@@nodomain' in the username/email field
Enter any password (e.g. 'TestPassword@123') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Please enter a valid email address'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application safely handles the SQL injection input, denies login, and does not expose any database errors or sensitive information
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter ''' OR '1'='1'; --' in the username/email field
Enter 'anyPassword' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated or redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed and no sensitive data or system error is exposed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in the username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application gracefully handles oversized input, prevents login, and displays a user-friendly error or enforces field character limits
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a string of 256 or more characters (e.g. 'aaaaaaa...@test.com' repeated to exceed typical field limits) in the username/email field
Enter a valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the application does not crash or throw an unhandled exception
Verify an appropriate error message is shown such as 'Input is too long' or the field enforces a character limit
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with excessively long username input (boundary value)
